subtitle: Explore General information about your properties and leases below.

tour.welcomeDesc: This is your central hub where you can view all important information about your property management at a glance.
tour.statsDesc: Here you can see key metrics like total properties, active leases, total tenants, and monthly revenue. These cards give you a quick overview of your business.
tour.salesChartDesc: This chart shows your monthly revenue trends, helping you track your income over time.
tour.costChartDesc: View your cost distribution across different categories like rent, utilities, and maintenance.
